{{Quote|Observation: This cave is infested with shyracks, a species of easy-to-kill winged pests. They shall prove useful for testing my blaster accuracy ratio.|[[HK-47]]|<ref name="TSL" />}}
The '''Shyrack cave''' resided on the desolate planet of [[Korriban/Legends|Korriban]]. Large groups of [[Shyrack/Legends|shyracks]] lived in this cave. The cave consisted of three separate tunnels and an abyss which was spanned by a small bridge.

==History==
{{Quote|That cave... it almost has a presence about it. Evil, almost hungry.|[[Brianna]]|<ref name="TSL" />}}
[[File:Shyrackswarm.jpg|thumb|left|200px|A [[Shyrack/Legends|shyrack]] swarm.]]
In [[3993 BBY]], while carrying out the [[Great Hunt (Jedi)|Great Hunt]], [[Duron Qel-Droma]] died in the cave, failing to [[Cleansing of Korriban|cleanse]] it of [[Terentatek/Legends|terentateks]].<ref name="SaL">{{Tales|23|Shadows and Light}}</ref>

In [[3956 BBY]], [[Thalia May]] and two other renegade [[Sith/Legends|Sith]] students hid from [[Uthar Wynn]] in the cave, but a terentatek trapped them there. [[Revan/Legends|Revan]] slew the beast on the bridge so that the three students could escape. He also found the body of Duron Qel-Droma.<ref name="KOTOR" />

The [[Tomb of Ludo Kressh]], which [[Meetra Surik]] explored during her search for [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master]] [[Lonna Vash]] in [[3951 BBY]], was located in the cave.<ref name="TSL" />
